short_summary: Kimberly Merle Schrier ( SHRIRE; born August 23, 1968) is an American former physician and politician who has served as the U.S. representative for Washington's 8th congressional district since 2019. She is a member of the Democratic Party. Her district includes the suburbs east of Seattle, and extends across the Cascade Range to rural areas in central Washington, as well as the cities of Wenatchee and Ellensburg.
